task_objective: Increase Correlation Matrix size and adjust report layout for wider screens
design_decisions: Increased correlation matrix cell size from w-12 h-12 to w-16 h-16 for better readability.
Adjusted header height and text alignment in correlation matrix to match larger cells.
Broadened the main report content area from max-w-7xl (1280px) to max-w-[1600px].
Centered the correlation matrix using flex and mx-auto.
Increased variable quick view grid from 4 to 5 columns on large screens.
Increased scatter plot maximum width from max-w-4xl to max-w-5xl.
results: The report layout is now more spacious, and the correlation matrix is significantly larger and easier to read on desktop screens.
